summary: Verified CRITICAL BUG FIX: while(true) agent loop in message-stream.js now correctly contains tool processing code. Previously, the while loop closed at line 1475 (before tool handlers), causing agentLoopContinue to be set but never checked. Now the while loop extends to line 2786, enclosing all tool handlers (read_files, edit_lines, verify_build, exec_command) and the agentLoopContinue check.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 verified the critical while(true) agent loop bug fix. The loop now correctly contains tool processing (lines 1265-2786). All unit tests pass (18/18 edit-lines, 4/4 agent-loop-edit-flow).

frontend_login.note: Login with testprov@test.com / password123 works, redirects to dashboard

message_stream_syntax.note: File parses correctly with no syntax errors

bug_fix_verification.issue: Agent loop's while(true) was closing at line 1475 (before tool processing), causing ALL tool calls to execute OUTSIDE the while loop
bug_fix_verification.impact: AI would read files but never proceed to edit them because agentLoopContinue=true was set but never checked
bug_fix_verification.fix: Restructured while loop to include tool processing (now closes at line 2786) and added proper agentLoopContinue check after tool handlers
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Brace depth analysis confirmed while(true) at line 1265 closes at line 2786, with all tool handlers (lines 2569-2715) inside the loop
